description: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct, unquantized, as served in the baseline benchmarks. Example fixture (as of 2026-07 — re-verify at use time).

provenance.source: checkpoint safetensors total size at the pinned revision (bf16)
provenance.notes: for the unquantized bf16 checkpoint; a quantized variant is a different profile

computed from the pinned config.json architecture: 2 (K+V) x 32 layers x 8 KV heads x 128 head_dim x 2 bytes (fp16 KV dtype)
provenance.notes: recompute if kv_cache_dtype changes; numeric equality with context_limit_tokens is coincidence

notes: Matches the model block of the benchmark run-manifest example and the vLLM capability descriptor's tokenizer pin.
